text.title: Deterministic Test Data Pattern Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply Deterministic Test Data Pattern end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: pick-anchor
step.action: Choose the anchor module (e.g. `tests/fixtures/index.ts`); declare seed, frozen_clock, locale, timezone constants.

step.name: wrap-randomness
step.action: Replace direct random/uuid/date calls with anchor-bound factories.
step.output: diff replacing ≥1 raw call per concern

step.name: freeze-clock
step.action: Install clock-freezer (sinon, freezegun, etc.) globally in test setup; assert no raw clock leaks.

step.name: pin-locale
step.action: Set LC_ALL + TZ in test runner config; pin Intl-NumberFormat / Locale constructors.

step.name: verify
step.action: Run suite N=3 times; outputs must be byte-identical. Print seed + clock + locale in failure trace.

step.name: emit-artefact
step.action: Record fixtures module paths + seed + clock + locale into artefact JSON.
